## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run lint` passes
- [ ] `bun run test:unit` passes
- [ ] `bun run build` succeeds
- [ ] New components have co-located tests
- [ ] Uses semantic color classes (not hardcoded Tailwind colors)
- [ ] Type-only imports for `@octokit/*` types
